Award-Nominated Journalist.

Belfast-born journalist based in Dublin. Shortlisted as Features Journalist of the Year and Young Journalist of the Year in Irish Journalism Awards 2025.

BBC Young Climate Reporter

Worked with BBC NI on digital coverage of COP26

Belfast Telegraph

Articles and columns for Belfast Telegraph

Irish Farmers Journal

Reporting and features for the Irish Farmers Journal

Irish News

Columns for Irish News

Sustainable Conversations Podcast

Researched, produced and hosted the podcast, Sustainable Conversations
